steps.title: Identify the passage's main focus
steps.content: The passage opens with Edwards's play but quickly develops explanations of NEC's origins (how Ward and Hooks met, their shared vision) and its impact (founded 1967, it gave Black playwrights a forum for their work). The Edwards play illustrates, rather than defines, the passage's main subject.

steps.title: Match the main purpose
steps.content: Only choice D captures both how NEC came to exist and why it matters. Choices A and B elevate peripheral details to the main point, while C claims a partnership evolution the passage never traces. That matches choice D — D is correct.
